text: HDFC Mutual Fund Statement & Capital Gains Report Download Guide: To download account statements, consolidation reports, or capital gains transaction statements, users can log into the Groww app or website, navigate to 'Profile' -> 'Reports' -> 'Mutual Funds' and download the PDF statement. Alternatively, investors can visit the official HDFC Mutual Fund investor portal or the registrar's website (CAMS) to request a statement via registered email.
